entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `brandName` TEXT NOT NULL, `genericName` TEXT NOT NULL, `brandedPrice` INTEGER NOT NULL, `genericPrice` INTEGER NOT NULL, `manufacturer` TEXT NOT NULL, `imageName` TEXT NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_medicines_brandName
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_medicines_brandName` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`brandName`)

indices.name: index_medicines_genericName
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_medicines_genericName` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`genericName`)

indices.name: index_medicines_manufacturer
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_medicines_manufacturer` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`manufacturer`)

indices.name: index_medicines_category
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_medicines_category` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`category`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
